_comment: Tier-2 cross-backend audit (filed under kratos for runner routing only — semantically backend-agnostic): walks every PhysicsCapability across all 7 backends and asserts generate_input() neither (a) raises NameError (catches f-string variable-typo class bugs found in ngsolve plasticity/nonlinear_elasticity/phase_field on 2026-06-01) nor (b) exceeds a 22-failure ceiling for other exception classes (missing template entries — PR work tracked by tasks #25-29). Generalizes FEBio falsifications #29 + #30 across all 7 backends. Catches the falsification class 'catalog advertises physics that has no working generator'. Floor decreases automatically as template stubs are filled.
